news.t: Six of the Best Small-Cap ETFs to Buy Now

holdings.infoBox: DGS is an equity ETF with a total of 1009 individual holdings. The top holdings are Innolux stock at 2.38%, Growthpoint Properties at 1.20%, Powertech Technology at 1.11%, Compeq Manufacturing at 1.02%, and Banco del Bajio at 0.93%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree Emerging Markets SmallCap Dividend Fund (DGS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund tracks a dividend-weighted index of small-cap, dividend-paying emerging market stocks. DGS was launched on Oct 30, 2007 and is issued by WisdomTree.

data.text: It's been a rough stretch for small-cap ETFs, but the clouds appear to be parting. Here are six we like.
